summary: Iteration 2 testing complete — all 3 new feature areas verified end-to-end. Backend: 14/14 new tests pass (auth/phone, addresses CRUD, coupon CRUD, /config offers, order discount). Full regression 30/31 pass (1 pre-existing test-side email-casing mismatch from iteration 1 — server intentionally lowercases emails). Frontend: AuthModal gating works (signup creates account, cart counter increments, toast appears); Login page uses MOBILE NUMBER + PASSWORD only; /account Addresses tab + Add/Delete work; /admin/offers create/list works (FRTST92045 created); promo marquee shows active+public offers in gold; AdminProducts has pf-image-upload file input; Checkout shows 'Use saved address' dropdown and auto-fills, coupon-input + coupon-apply present. Iteration-1 admin sidebar bug is FIXED — sidebar now shows Dashboard/Products/Orders/Rentals/Offers/Customers.

minor.issue: Pre-existing iteration-1 test (test_auth_me) fails because server lowercases the email before storing — assertion was case-sensitive in old test. Server behaviour is correct. Not a regression.

issues: React dev-mode hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. This is caused by the Emergent dev-overlay injecting a <span> wrapper around the option text for source-tracking; it is not present in the original source. Will not appear in production build. No user-visible impact, dropdown works (auto-fill verified).

action_items: (Optional / cosmetic) Old test_backend.py::test_auth_me compares email case-sensitively — already adjusted phone uniqueness this iteration; could lowercase in the assertion. Not blocking.
(Optional) Consider tightening CORS allow_origins to known origin if cookie-based auth becomes default.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py still ~880 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth, products, orders, admin, coupons) for maintainability.

POST /api/auth/register: if email omitted, server synthesises '<phone>@sejal.local'. This is fine but means duplicate-phone error and email unique-index can both trigger; current code checks phone first which is correct.
POST /api/orders accepts coupon_code without validating that the coupon's min_order is met — discount applies regardless of subtotal threshold. Spec didn't ask for it but worth tightening.
DELETE /api/admin/coupons does not 404 when coupon_id missing (always returns ok). Minor.
Coupon code is stored uppercase but PUT update uppercases again only on the body — code rename to existing code could collide; add unique index on coupons.code.
/config exposes 'offers' publicly — make sure coupons collection never stores sensitive fields (it doesn't today).
AuthModal opens whenever Add to Cart / Wishlist / Buy Now is clicked while logged-out — verified working, and the queued action fires after signup (cart counter incremented to 1 in test).
Login.jsx uses inputMode='numeric' for the mobile field but does not enforce length client-side; backend validates >=8 digits.

Checkout 'Use saved address' renders <option> with map of fields — emergent dev-overlay injects <span> wrappers triggering React HTML-nesting warning. Production build will not include the overlay, so this is benign.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py (phone randomised in fixture to avoid duplicate-phone collisions)
test_credentials: Admin: sejal2402 / Adishakti. Customer flow registered fresh phone per run (e.g. 9782292073 / Test@123).
seed_data_creation: Created coupons DIWALI20 (via earlier test) and FRTST92045 (via UI) that remain in DB and now show in marquee. Backend test_admin_delete_coupon removes the per-run TEST* coupon. UI-created FRTST92045 was not cleaned up — main agent may delete from /admin/offers.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration-2 features all verified. Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration2.py cover phone-only auth, address CRUD, coupon CRUD + public lookup, /config offers field, and coupon discount in /api/orders. Frontend testids in place: auth-modal, auth-modal-{name,phone,password,submit,switch,title}, login-identifier, login-password, reg-{name,phone,password}, tab-addresses, add-address-btn, addr-form-*, addr-save-btn, addr-card-{id}, del-addr-{id}, admin-offers, add-offer-btn, off-{code,type,value,min,desc,save}, offer-row-{id}, pf-image-upload, saved-addr-select, coupon-input, coupon-apply. Admin sidebar nav now fully renders (iter1 bug fixed). DIWALI20 + FRTST92045 active+public coupons remain in DB.
